fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the IC general ledger account.

fields.name: Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the purpose of the account. Total: Used to total a series of balances on accounts from many different account groupings. To use Total, leave this field blank. Begin-Total: A marker for the beginning of a series of accounts to be totaled that ends with an End-Total account. End-Total: A total of a series of accounts that starts with the preceding Begin-Total account. The total is defined in the Totaling field.

fields.name: Income/Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a general ledger account is an income statement account or a balance sheet account.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Map-to G/L Acc. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the G/L account in your chart of accounts that corresponds to this intercompany G/L account.

fields.name: Indentation
fields.tooltip:
Shows how many spaces the text field for the account is indented relative to the standard margin.
The field is filled in automatically when you click Actions, point to Functions, and then click Indent IC Chart of Accounts.
You can enter something in the field, but the contents will be replaced the next time you click Indent IC Chart of Accounts. If you want a bigger indentation, add blank spaces with the spacebar before you enter the text.
